title: taraxacum chlorofrugale
intro: Taraxacum chlorofrugale, a species of the dandelion plant, is a perennial herb belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum chlorofrugale include its ability to support liver and kidney function, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of digestive disorders.
